scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @tracker/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter web build && corepack pnpm --filter worker build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter web lint && corepack pnpm --filter worker lint
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @tracker/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter web typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter worker typecheck
